prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年综合类最低位次约29280→31127→37914→39211→43708，整体持续后移，近4年累计后移约14428名；2025年基准位次约43708名，近2年每年后移约4000-4500名，后移速度加快；2021-2025年招生计划分别为344、357、358、364、374人，逐年小幅递增；2026年计划381人，较2025年增加7人（+1.87%），扩招幅度有限，对竞争缓解作用较小。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校；软科主榜排名从2021年76位稳步上升至2026年69位，学校综合实力和认可度持续提升，对考生吸引力有所增强；2022年曾因学术不端事件获偏负面评价，近年无重大舆情；抖音综合热度排名第75位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光度不高，整体报考关注度平稳；第五轮学科评估中，作物学、植物保护、畜牧学、草学4个学科获评A-，农林特色鲜明，与招生专业高度关联，对相关专业报考有一定支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 相关农林类专业社会热度总体平稳；山东省2026年高考报名人数约72万人，较2025年68.1万人增加约3.9万人（+5.7%），考生规模明显扩大，竞争加剧；省控线2025年普通类一段441分，近年波动不大；西北农林科技大学位于陕西咸阳，在山东省招生规模较大（2025年374人），属于跨省招生占比较高的985院校，地域偏好对报考影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划仅小幅扩招（+1.87%）、山东省考生规模明显扩大（+5.7%），竞争压力上升是主导因素；学校软科排名稳步提升对吸引力有正面作用，但声誉和热度一般。预计2026年最低位次在2025年基准上继续后移，预测约44999名，区间44499-45499名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间44499-45499名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次优于区间下限（<44499名）可重点冲击一档电子信息工程、法学等热门专业；位次接近区间上限（>45499名）建议以三档农林特色专业为主，确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum comprehensive ranking was approximately 29280 → 31127 → 37914 → 39211 → 43708, showing a continuous backward shift overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 14428 places in the last 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 43708, with an annual backward shift of about 4000-4500 places in the last 2 years, accelerating the backward shift; enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 344, 357, 358, 364, and 374 respectively, increasing slightly year by year; the 2026 plan is 381, an increase of 7 (+1.87%) compared to 2025, with limited expansion, having a small effect on alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science main ranking steadily rose from 76th in 2021 to 69th in 2026, with continuously improving comprehensive strength and recognition, enhancing attractiveness to candidates; in 2022, there was a negative evaluation due to an academic misconduct incident, with no major public opinion in recent years; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 75th, rated as 'average', with low exposure on short video platforms, overall stable application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 4 disciplines—Crop Science, Plant Protection, Animal Science, and Grassland Science—were rated A-, with distinctive agricultural and forestry characteristics, highly related to enrollment majors, providing some support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The overall social popularity of related agricultural and forestry majors is stable; the number of candidates for the 2026 Shandong college entrance examination is about 720,000, an increase of about 39,000 (+5.7%) compared to 681,000 in 2025, with a significant expansion in candidate scale, intensifying competition; the provincial control line for the 2025 general category first segment is 441 points, with little fluctuation in recent years; Northwest A&F University is located in Xianyang, Shaanxi, with a large enrollment scale in Shandong (374 in 2025), being a 985 university with a relatively high proportion of cross-provincial enrollment, with a neutral impact of regional preference on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the continuous backward shift trend of historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment plan only slightly expands (+1.87%), and the significant expansion of Shandong candidate scale (+5.7%), rising competitive pressure is the dominant factor; the steady improvement of the Soft Science ranking has a positive effect on attractiveness, but reputation and popularity are average. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline, predicted to be about 44999, with a range of 44499-45499.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 44499-45499, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 majors for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as safety; for rankings better than the lower limit (<44499), focus on challenging Tier 1 popular majors like Electronic Information Engineering and Law; for rankings near the upper limit (>45499), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 agricultural and forestry characteristic majors to ensure admission.
